description: A photograph depicting a heart-shaped swimming pool with light blue water, set within a green lawned garden. The pool is surrounded by light-coloured paving. In the background, white residential buildings with red tiled roofs are visible, alongside trees including a tall palm tree on the left. White lounge chairs are positioned on the grass and next to the pool. This image exemplifies the land cover class 'Low density urban fabric (Imperviousness Density (IM.D) <30%)', where vegetated areas are predominant, and the average degree of soil sealing is less than 30%.
